reviews.review_title: Perfect down to the last small detail
reviews.review_description: This game is great, spectacular even. This makes scary baboons seem like utter garbage, and this makes gorilla tag itself look so boring. I love this game and now will play it nonstop. I know the creator and this makes me wanna promote this game everywhere because it is amazing I can make a religion out of this game and people WILL love it.
Hands down this is one of the best games out there the community is really nice if you ask something it will probably be in the game like me

The game has a lot to offer including an amazing shop with a clicker that I am addicted to, a forest with the floor is lava and zero gravity, horror will have 6 levels so far, we have a fan art room, and moderator vents are the rules (which in my opinion is the coolest thing ever). - Pine_vr (Mod)
THIS GAME IS THE BEST DOWNLOAD THE GAME AND JOIN THE DISCORD!!!!!!
This is legitimately fun I can’t wait to see what it will become one day

This game has many things like an amazing owner, different maps and even has settings like RTX and a flashlight. If you press X on your controller it has a camera, shows you the amount of players online, your FPS and VR battery. If you don’t have this game, DOWNLOAD IT!!
BROSKI, this is the best game I ever played. I'm one of ur friends, and when I started to play ur game, it was awesome
This is a masterpiece because I made the thumbnail of the game and am friends with the creator it self
The game is amazing and takes a good turn on the gtag fan games the community has great moderators and is supper fun I strongly advise to get this as it is new and helps the creator
